text:
Saturn first meets Moon and next the inimical planet Dragon-Tail.
Hence the native will have to resign the job and can enjoy benefits
through land gains, and cultivation, because Saturn will have the
aspect of Moon and Dragon-Tail in successive signs.
SATURN+MOON+
DRA.TAIL Here it indicates that the native will
have to resign the job and can enjoy

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 69
benefits from land gains and
Agricultural aspects. The above
combination has been dealt in
Bhrughu samhita-pertaining to
career which explains that:-
"RAJADWARE DW1HNATAYAN1E
TA1HA BHOOMI PRAY OJANAHA"
NOTE:- The above explains the effet of presence of various
planets in successive degrees of signs, from the position of Saturn.
MOON+SATURN+
MERCURY Career of the native involves
travelling, commercial lines, benefits
through soft talented type of career,
pious and decent way of talking (not
gaining through harsh ways), artistic
flair.
MOON+SATURN+JUP. . Career as a teacher or guide in fme
